texto: Surplus [Money Mindset]: Feeling grateful and ready to share Members of the surplus group believe they have more than enough. They don’t constantly long for more. They display a high level of contentment even if their lifestyle is average — or below. Their purchases match their needs, not their income. And because they feel grateful, they are ready to share. Most joyfully give away more than 10 percent of their gross income.
explicacao: Citação de Brad Hewitt sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Surplus [Money Mindset]: Feeling grateful and ready to share Members of the surplus group believe…” articula reflexao, financial-peace, money em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como money.
